creator: arkadiy.yaruta@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #1)
Hi Michael.
Sorry for the delay in reply.
I found a bug in my patch and closed this request.
I tried to make a new port for new versions of Jitsi, but it turned out to be not so easy. You are ahead of me on this one (Bug 257232). Great job!
